  <!-- Title -->
  <text x="20" y="30" font-family="serif" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#F0EDD0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="0s"/>

  <!-- Leaf Tissue Structure (Cells) -->
  <path d="M50 100 Q 100 80 150 100 T 250 100 T 350 100" stroke="#81C784" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="400" stroke-dashoffset="400">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="400" to="0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="0.3s"/>
  </path>

  <rect x="60" y="120" width="80" height="100" rx="10" stroke="#4FC3F7" stroke-width="2" fill="#4FC3F7" fill-opacity="0.25" stroke-dasharray="400" stroke-dashoffset="400">

  </rect>
  <rect x="260" y="120" width="80" height="100" rx="10" stroke="#4FC3F7" stroke-width="2" fill="#4FC3F7" fill-opacity="0.25" stroke-dasharray="400" stroke-dashoffset="400">
    <animate attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="400" to="0" dur="0.6s" fill="freeze" begin="1.2s"/>
  </rect>

  <!-- Chloroplasts -->
  <ellipse cx="100" cy="150" rx="20" ry="12" fill="#81C784" fill-opacity="0.6" stroke="#81C784" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="1.5s"/>
  </ellipse>
  <ellipse cx="190" cy="180" rx="20" ry="12" fill="#81C784" fill-opacity="0.6" stroke="#81C784" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="1.8s"/>
  </ellipse>
  <ellipse cx="300" cy="160" rx="20" ry="12" fill="#81C784" fill-opacity="0.6" stroke="#81C784" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="2.1s"/>
  </ellipse>

    Chloroplast
  </text>
  <line x1="300" y1="172" x2="300" y2="185" stroke="#F0EDD0" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">

  </line>

    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.35s" fill="freeze" begin="2.4s"/>
    Solar energy conversion
  </text>
